capability_classes.economy: retrieval, inventory, deterministic edits, and narrow checks
capability_classes.standard: ordinary planning, implementation, and integration review
capability_classes.expert: unresolved material risk or independent expert review

evidence_contract.requested: The route, provider preference, and effort requested by the agent or owner.
evidence_contract.resolved: The provider/model/effort selected by the host or adapter.
evidence_contract.observed: Fresh independently attested execution or outcome evidence.
evidence_contract.fail_honest: Requested and resolved values are not observed evidence. Missing attestation is unknown and cannot support PASS.

codex.expert_escalation: Use high effort only when material risk requires it.

grok.effort_evidence: Per-role and spawn-time effort overrides are supported. Record requested, resolved, and observed effort separately; missing attestation leaves only observed effort unknown.
